description.value:
Prerequisite: At least three ranks in the Strong Hero class.

Benefit: Character gains two talents from the Strong hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list, and the character must meet all prerequisites: Extreme Effort Talent Tree: Improved Extreme Effort or Advanced Extreme Effort. Ignore Hardness Talent Tree: Improved Ignore Hardness or Advanced Ignore Hardness. Melee Smash Talent Tree: Improved Melee Smash or Advanced Melee Smash.

Special: This feat may be selected multiple times. Each time it is selected, a different pair of talents must be chosen than the previous times.
